metadata.description: Claude Code skills for Red Hat Solution Architects — OpenShift and Ansible PoC generators

plugins.name: openshift-poc
plugins.description: Creates structured OpenShift PoC repositories for bug reproductions, feature demos, and capability setups using Red Hat products

plugins.name: ansible-poc
plugins.description: Creates structured Ansible PoC repositories for customer demos and automation scenarios using Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform
